about.title: About KLP48
about.subtitle: The story of Malaysia's AKB48 sister group
about.storyP1: KLP48 is Malaysia's official AKB48 sister group, established as part of the global 48 Group family that originated with AKB48 in Akihabara, Tokyo. KLP48 represents the cultural bridge between Malaysia and Japan, bringing the beloved idol culture to Southeast Asia's vibrant entertainment scene.
about.storyP2: The group made its historic debut on August 16, 2024, at Zepp Kuala Lumpur, performing iconic songs including "Heavy Rotation" and "Aitakatta" to an enthusiastic crowd. This debut marked a milestone in Malaysia's entertainment industry, establishing the country as part of the prestigious 48 Group network.
about.storyP3: KLP48's identity is rooted in Malaysian jade — the group's official brand color symbolizing gentle aura, empathy, and the fusion of cultures. The group embodies the concept of "idols you can meet," maintaining the 48 Group tradition of intimate theater performances and close fan interaction.
about.milestone1Desc: KLP48 debuted at Zepp Kuala Lumpur with performances of Heavy Rotation, Aitakatta, and more.
about.milestone2Desc: Official music video for KLP48's cover of Heavy Rotation was released.
about.milestone3Desc: KLP48 released their cover of AKB48's iconic summer anthem.
about.milestone4Desc: KLP48's debut EP featuring a collection of songs showcasing the group's range.
about.milestone5Desc: KLP48 celebrated their 1st anniversary with the BLOOM concert at Zepp Kuala Lumpur.
about.milestone6Desc: Live recording from the BLOOM concert released as a single.
about.groupFamilyDesc: KLP48 is part of the global 48 Group network, a family of idol groups founded on the concept created by producer Yasushi Akimoto. Starting with AKB48 in 2005, the network has grown to include sister groups across Japan and internationally, each bringing their local culture to the 48 Group identity.

fanclub.title: Fan Club
fanclub.subtitle: Join the official KLP48 Fan Club and get exclusive access to members, events, and content.
fanclub.ctaDesc: Get closer to KLP48 with exclusive benefits, priority access to events, and members-only content.
fanclub.benefit1Desc: Early access and priority purchasing for concerts, handshake events, and special events.
fanclub.benefit2Desc: Exclusive fan meeting sessions with KLP48 members, both online and in-person.
fanclub.benefit3Desc: Behind-the-scenes photos, videos, and members-only blog posts.
fanclub.benefit4Desc: Monthly interactive Discord sessions where you can talk directly with the members.
fanclub.benefit5Desc: Fan club exclusive merchandise and early access to limited edition items.
fanclub.benefit6Desc: Special birthday celebration events for your favorite members.

footer.tagline2: Bridging Malaysian and Japanese idol culture.
